title: Contrast text in calendar widget
excerpt: When I change the color of a label/item type the contrast is bad when I view it in a calendar dashboard component. See attached screen shot. If it’s a dk BG color the text turns white in other instances but in the calend…

posts.author: jsherry (Juli)
posts.cookedHtml:
When I change the color of a label/item type the contrast is bad when I view it in a calendar dashboard component. See attached screen shot. If it’s a dk BG color the text turns white in other instances but in the calendar it stays black and is impossible to read if I choose a dark color for the item type. Would love to see it change to white for better contrast.

Screen Shot 2022-03-03 at 3.18.58 PM740×404 19.1 KB

posts.author: AKBurczyk (Amanda Burczyk)
posts.cookedHtml: I’d like this option across Monday as a whole!

posts.author: dspry (David Spry)
posts.cookedHtml: This also applies to Calendar views in Boards.

posts.author: StuartCulshaw (Stuart Culshaw)
posts.cookedHtml:
When using anything but the lightest colours for status column values, the calendar view is unreadable. In the table view, the text colour switches automatically to white when the background colour is dark, but the text remains black in the calendar view, making the entries very difficult to read. This accessibility/usability issue needs to be prioritized asap.

EDIT: Actually, I just noticed that the text always remains White in the table view, which makes the status column text in that view pretty difficult to read on light-coloured backgrounds. Catch 22
